zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme於1235年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm25歲，母親Emma de Vetereponte26歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1296年在英國蘇格蘭享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme于1235年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm25岁，母亲Emma de Vetereponte26岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1296年在英国苏格兰享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chisholme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chisholm
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Chisholme near Hawick in southern Scotland, which derives its name from Old English c̄se, cēse ‘cheese’ (from Latin caseus) + holm ‘piece of dry land in a fen’ and refers to a waterside meadow good for dairy farming and hence for producing cheeses. In the 14th century members of this family migrated to the Highlands, settling in Strathglass, where their name was Gaelicized as Siosal.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme was born in 1235, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm, was 25 and his mother, Emma de Vetereponte, was 26. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1296, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme est né en 1235, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Emma de Vetereponte, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1296, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme 1235 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm 25 und seine Mutter Emma de Vetereponte 26. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1296 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme è nato il nel 1235 nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Vetereponte, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1296, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholmeが1235年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholmは25歳，母Emma de Vetereponteは26歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1296年にイギリススコットランドで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme(이)가 1235년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Vetereponte(은)는 26세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme nasceu em 1235, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Vetereponte, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1296, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme родился в 1235 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Vetereponte, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Chisholme Del Counte de Rokesburgh, 2nd of Chisholme nació en 1235, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Chisholme 1st of Chisholm, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Emma de Vetereponte, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1296, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
